description_long: This is a dark, classical-style bust sculpture depicting the head and upper torso of a bearded male figure with wavy hair. The sculpture is mounted on a square pedestal base, giving it a formal and dignified appearance. The facial features are finely detailed, with prominent cheekbones, a defined nose, and a slightly furrowed brow. The hair is sculpted in textured waves, and the beard is full and well-defined, adding to the lifelike quality. The back of the bust shows the continuation of the hair texture and the smooth transition to the neck and shoulders. The overall finish is matte and the material appears to be a dark stone or bronze.
description: A dark, classical bust of a bearded man with wavy hair, mounted on a square pedestal base. The sculpture features detailed facial features and a matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed face, wavy hair, and full beard of the male figure.
description_view_1: Left profile view highlighting the sharp nose, beard, and the contour of the hair and neck.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the textured hair and the smooth back of the neck and shoulders.
description_view_3: Right profile view showing the side of the face, beard, and the transition from the head to the pedestal.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is plain and does not indicate a specific setting.
